mapper.select: select id, title, content, delflg, compflg, newdate, newtime, upddate from TASKMNGTBL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TASKMNGTBL( title, content, delflg, compflg, newdate, newtime, upddate ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{delflg}, #{compflg}, #{newdate}, #{newtime}, #{upddate} )
mapper.select: select id, title, content, delflg, compflg, newdate, newtime, upddate from TASKMNGTBL where id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE TASKMNGTBL SET compflg=true WHERE id=#{id}
